description_long: This is a classic chessboard set on a thick, rectangular wooden base with a visibly textured grain. The playing surface features a standard 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, each square sharply defined and evenly sized. The chessboard is fully set up with two complete sets of chess pieces: one in glossy black and the other in matte white, each arranged in their starting positions. The chess pieces are traditional in style, with distinct forms for pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings, all proportionally sized to the board. The border of the board is a wide band of natural wood, slightly raised above the playing surface, with no visible ornamentation or inscriptions. The overall appearance is elegant and functional, suitable for both casual and competitive play in public parks or urban recreational spaces.
description: A wooden chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, bordered by a thick, natural wood frame and set up with black and white chess pieces in starting positions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chessboard with all pieces in starting positions, black pieces closest and white pieces opposite, highlighting the board's grid and wooden border.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the height and thickness of the wooden base, with both sets of chess pieces visible in profile along the board's length.
description_view_2: Rear view with white pieces in the foreground and black pieces at the back, providing a clear look at the chessboard's grid and the wood grain of the border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the white pieces closest and the black pieces further away, again highlighting the board's thickness and the arrangement of the pieces.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating light and dark squares. The squares are perfectly square-shaped and evenly distributed, with no decorative elements or markings within the grid itself.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, raised band of natural wood with a visible grain pattern, medium brown in color, and free of ornamentation, inscriptions, or additional markings. The border is smooth and slightly elevated above the playing surface, providing a sturdy frame for the board.
